---
title: "Lab Resources"
---

Resources for lab members and the wider research community.

## EEG Tutorials

A collection of EEG tutorials recorded in the BLiNK Lab, covering setup,
recording, and data processing.

[View the EEG tutorials](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1IAOXpiETAsi0iOyNkxB8NY0BqRRvSGBX?usp=share_link){.signup-button}
